Package cc.quaternion.potshaper

Class PotHyperlink

java.lang.Object
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotHyperlink
public class PotHyperlink extends Object
Represents a hyperlink that can be applied to shapes within a PowerPoint presentation.

This class provides a fluent API to create hyperlinks of various types, including URLs, links to other slides, files, and email addresses. It encapsulates the hyperlink data and provides a method to apply it to Apache POI XSLFSimpleShape objects. Instances are immutable after creation via the static factory methods, except for the optional tooltip which can be set using the builder-style tooltip(String) method.

Usage Example


 // Create a URL hyperlink
 element.hyperlink("https://www.example.com");

 // Create a hyperlink to a specific slide
 element.hyperlinkToSlide(2);  // Links to the third slide (zero-based index)

 // Create a PotHyperlink with a tooltip
 PotHyperlink link = PotHyperlink.url("https://www.example.com")
     .tooltip("Click to visit");
 element.hyperlink(link);
Since:
1.0
Author:
Quaternion8192

    Creates a hyperlink that opens the default email client with a new message.

  • Method Details

    • url

      public static PotHyperlink url(String url)
      Creates a hyperlink to an external URL.
      Parameters:
      url - the absolute URL (e.g., "https://www.example.com")
      Returns:
      a new PotHyperlink instance of type PotLinkType.URL
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if url is null

    • slide

      public static PotHyperlink slide(int slideIndex)
      Creates a hyperlink to a specific slide within the same presentation.
      Parameters:
      slideIndex - the zero-based index of the target slide
      Returns:
      a new PotHyperlink instance of type PotLinkType.SLIDE

    • firstSlide

      public static PotHyperlink firstSlide()
      Creates a hyperlink to the first slide of the presentation.
      Returns:
      a new PotHyperlink instance of type PotLinkType.FIRST_SLIDE

    • lastSlide

      public static PotHyperlink lastSlide()
      Creates a hyperlink to the last slide of the presentation.
      Returns:
      a new PotHyperlink instance of type PotLinkType.LAST_SLIDE

    • nextSlide

      public static PotHyperlink nextSlide()
      Creates a hyperlink to the next slide relative to the current slide.
      Returns:
      a new PotHyperlink instance of type PotLinkType.NEXT_SLIDE

    • previousSlide

      public static PotHyperlink previousSlide()
      Creates a hyperlink to the previous slide relative to the current slide.
      Returns:
      a new PotHyperlink instance of type PotLinkType.PREVIOUS_SLIDE

    • file

      public static PotHyperlink file(String filePath)
      Creates a hyperlink to a local or network file.
      Parameters:
      filePath - the path to the file (e.g., "C:\\docs\\file.pdf" or "/home/user/file.pdf")
      Returns:
      a new PotHyperlink instance of type PotLinkType.FILE
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if filePath is null

    • email

      public static PotHyperlink email(String email)
      Creates a hyperlink that opens the default email client with a new message.
      Parameters:
      email - the recipient's email address
      Returns:
      a new PotHyperlink instance of type PotLinkType.EMAIL
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if email is null

    • email

      public static PotHyperlink email(String email, String subject)
      Creates a hyperlink that opens the default email client with a new message, including a subject.
      Parameters:
      email - the recipient's email address
      subject - the subject line for the email, may be null or empty
      Returns:
      a new PotHyperlink instance of type PotLinkType.EMAIL
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if email is null

    • tooltip

      public PotHyperlink tooltip(String tooltip)
      Sets the tooltip text for this hyperlink.

      This method follows a builder pattern, allowing method chaining.

      Parameters:
      tooltip - the tooltip text to display when hovering over the hyperlink
      Returns:
      this PotHyperlink instance for method chaining

    • getType

      public PotLinkType getType()
      Returns the type of this hyperlink.
      Returns:
      the PotLinkType of this hyperlink

    • getAddress

      public String getAddress()
      Returns the address associated with this hyperlink.

      For URL, file, and email hyperlinks, this is the full address string. For slide hyperlinks, this may be null.

      Returns:
      the hyperlink address, or null if not applicable

    • getTooltip

      public String getTooltip()
      Returns the tooltip text for this hyperlink.
      Returns:
      the tooltip text, or null if not set

    • getTargetSlideIndex

      public int getTargetSlideIndex()
      Returns the zero-based index of the target slide.

      This is only meaningful for hyperlinks of type PotLinkType.SLIDE.

      Returns:
      the target slide index, or -1 if not applicable

    • getEmailSubject

      public String getEmailSubject()
      Returns the subject line for an email hyperlink.
      Returns:
      the email subject, or null if not applicable or not set

    • isUrl

      public boolean isUrl()
      Checks if this hyperlink is an external URL.
      Returns:
      true if the type is PotLinkType.URL, otherwise false

    • isSlide

      public boolean isSlide()
      Checks if this hyperlink targets a slide within the presentation.

      This includes links to specific slides, first slide, last slide, next slide, and previous slide.

      Returns:
      true if the type is any slide-related type, otherwise false

    • isFile

      public boolean isFile()
      Checks if this hyperlink is a file link.
      Returns:
      true if the type is PotLinkType.FILE, otherwise false

    • isEmail

      public boolean isEmail()
      Checks if this hyperlink is an email link.
      Returns:
      true if the type is PotLinkType.EMAIL, otherwise false

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this hyperlink.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a string in the format "PotHyperlink{type=TYPE, address='ADDRESS'}"

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Compares this hyperlink to the specified object for equality.

      Two PotHyperlink instances are considered equal if they have the same type, address, and target slide index. The tooltip and email subject are not considered.

      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      o - the object to compare with
      Returns:
      true if the objects are equal, otherwise false

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this hyperlink.
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object
      Returns:
      the hash code based on type, address, and target slide index
